subcodes.first_line: O family, prepared for the field of sacrifice! Jinab-i-Aqa Rahmatullah hath arrived, and I hope that he will render service at the Sacred Threshold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خانواده آماده میدان فدا جناب آقا رحمت الله وارد و امیدوارم که بخدمت آستان
subcodes.subjects: @wisdom [hikmat], @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @suffering and imprisonment, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
